option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <!-- Portuguese (Brazil) translations / Traduções em Português --> <resources> <string name="app_name">EFL Visitor App</string>
<!-- HomeScreen --> <string name="welcome">Bem-vindo</string> <string name="visitor_registration_system">Sistema de Registro de Visitantes</string> <string name="select_language">Selecionar Idioma</string> <string name="new_visit">Nova Visita</string> <string name="new_visit_desc">Registrar um novo visitante</string> <string name="returning_visit">Visita Recorrente</string> <string name="returning_visit_desc">Visitante já registrado</string> <string name="end_visit">Encerrar Visita</string> <string name="end_visit_desc">Escanear código QR de saída</string>
<!-- Language names --> <string name="lang_spanish">Espanhol</string> <string name="lang_english">Inglês</string> <string name="lang_portuguese">Português</string> <string name="lang_french">Francês</string>
<!-- Navigation --> <string name="back">Voltar</string> <string name="continue_btn">Continuar</string> <string name="cancel">Cancelar</string> <string name="finish">Finalizar</string> <string name="accept">Aceitar</string> <string name="confirm">Confirmar</string> <string name="edit">Editar</string> <string name="optional">Opcional</string>
<!-- DocumentScanScreen --> <string name="scan_document">Escanear Documento</string> <string name="scan_document_hint">Os documentos são digitalizados com a câmera traseira do dispositivo</string> <string name="i_am_a">Eu sou um:</string> <string name="visitor">Visitante</string> <string name="visitor_type">Visitante</string> <string name="contractor">Contratante</string> <string name="vendor">Fornecedor</string> <string name="delivery">Entrega</string> <string name="driver">Motorista</string> <string name="temporary_staff">Funcionário Temporário</string> <string name="other">Outro</string> <string name="select_option">Selecione uma opção</string> <string name="what_doc_type">Que tipo de documento você apresenta?</string> <string name="identity_document_id">Documento de Identidade / ID</string> <string name="passport">Passaporte</string> <string name="front_of_document">Frente do Documento</string> <string name="back_of_document">Verso do Documento</string> <string name="scanned_successfully">✓ Escaneado com sucesso</string> <string name="tap_to_scan">Toque para escanear</string> <string name="scan_front_first">Escaneie a frente primeiro</string>
<!-- DocumentCameraModal --> <string name="center_document">Centralize o documento no quadro</string> <string name="focusing">Focando...</string> <string name="capturing">Capturando...</string> <string name="verifying">Verificando...</string> <string name="document_accepted">Documento aceito!</string> <string name="capture_hint">A captura será automática quando o documento estiver em foco</string>
<!-- DocumentValidator error messages --> <string name="err_raw_blurry">Imagem desfocada.\nMantenha o documento quieto e tente novamente.</string> <string name="err_crop_failed">Não foi possível recortar o documento.\nTente novamente.</string> <string name="err_crop_blurry">O documento não está nítido.\nAproxime e estabilize o documento.</string> <string name="err_no_text">Nenhum texto detectado.\nCentralize o documento no quadro.</string> <string name="err_not_document">Não parece ser um documento de identidade.\nUse um ID, passaporte ou carteira.</string> <string name="err_not_recognised">Documento não reconhecido.\nCertifique-se de que está legível.</string> <string name="err_duplicate_side">Parece ser o mesmo lado do documento.\nVire-o e escaneie o verso.</string>
<!-- PersonDataScreen --> <string name="visitor_information">Informações do Visitante</string> <string name="personal_information">Informações Pessoais</string> <string name="first_name">Nome(s)</string> <string name="enter_first_name">Digite o(s) nome(s)</string> <string name="last_name">Sobrenome(s)</string> <string name="enter_last_name">Digite o(s) sobrenome(s)</string> <string name="company">Empresa</string> <string name="email">Endereço de e-mail</string> <string name="enter_email">exemplo@email.com</string> <string name="phone">Número de telefone</string> <string name="enter_phone">Digite o número de telefone</string> <string name="who_visiting">Nome completo da pessoa visitada</string> <string name="visiting_person">Pessoa Visitante</string> <string name="enter_who_visiting">Digite o nome da pessoa</string> <string name="personal_photo">Foto Pessoal</string> <string name="take_photo">Tirar Foto</string> <string name="retake_photo">Tirar Novamente</string> <string name="photo_taken_successfully">Foto tirada com sucesso</string> <string name="detected_from_document">Detectado automaticamente do documento</string> <string name="visit_reason">Motivo da Visita</string> <string name="select_visit_reason">Selecione um motivo</string> <string name="other_specify">Especifique o motivo</string> <string name="document_number">Número do Documento</string>
<!-- Photo Capture Modal --> <string name="get_ready">Prepare-se!</string> <string name="look_at_camera">Olhe para a câmera e sorria</string> <string name="photo_will_be_taken">A foto será tirada automaticamente</string> <string name="position_face">Posicione seu rosto na oval</string> <string name="detecting_face">Detectando rosto…</string> <string name="no_face_detected">Nenhum rosto detectado. Tente novamente.</string> <string name="face_detected">Rosto detectado!</string> <string name="retrying_capture">Tentando captura novamente…</string> <string name="face_partial">Rosto parcialmente visível. Centralize seu rosto completo.</string> <string name="face_too_small">Rosto muito longe. Aproxime-se da câmera.</string> <string name="face_off_center">Centralize seu rosto na tela.</string> <string name="skip_face_detection">Tirar foto sem detecção</string>
<!-- ConfirmScreen --> <string name="confirmation">Confirmação</string> <string name="verify_information">Verificar Informações</string> <string name="confirm_subtitle">Por favor, confirme que as informações estão corretas antes de finalizar o registro</string> <string name="documents_verified">Documentos Verificados</string> <string name="front_back_scanned">Frente e verso escaneados com sucesso</string> <string name="confirm_registration">Confirmar Registro</string> <string name="edit_information">Editar Informações</string> <string name="visitor_data">Dados do Visitante</string> <string name="visiting_label">Visitando</string> <string name="type_label">Tipo</string> <string name="document_type">Tipo de Documento</string> <string name="full_name_label">Nome Completo</string> <string name="date_and_time">Data e Hora</string> <string name="registration_success">Registro Realizado!</string> <string name="visitor_registered_correctly">O visitante foi registrado com sucesso.</string> <string name="visit_registered">Sua visita foi registrada com sucesso</string> <string name="keep_qr_code">Por favor, guarde este código QR para registrar sua saída</string> <string name="visit_qr_code">Código QR da Visita</string> <string name="printing_qr">Imprimindo código QR...</string> <string name="no_printer_found">Nenhuma impressora encontrada. Registro concluído com sucesso.</string> <string name="printing_badge">Imprimindo crachá do visitante…</string> <string name="badge_printed_and_registered">Visitante registrado e crachá impresso com sucesso.</string> <string name="print_error_but_registered">Visitante registrado com sucesso.\nErro de impressão: %1$s</string>
<!-- CheckoutQrScreen --> <string name="end_visit_title">Encerrar Visita</string> <string name="scan_qr_code">Escanear Código QR</string> <string name="present_qr">Apresente o código QR da sua visita para registrar a saída</string> <string name="place_qr">Coloque o código QR\nna área marcada</string> <string name="scanning_qr">Escaneando código QR...</string> <string name="valid_code">Código Válido!</string> <string name="processing_checkout">Processando saída...</string> <string name="start_scanning">Iniciar Escaneamento</string> <string name="use_qr_hint">Use o código QR recebido no momento do registro de entrada</string> <string name="checkout_success">Saída Registrada!</string> <string name="checkout_time">Hora de saída</string> <string name="thanks_for_visit">Obrigado pela sua visita</string> <string name="manual_checkout">Saída Manual</string> <string name="manual_checkout_instructions">Escaneie o código QR do visitante ou pesquise manualmente pelo nome para concluir a saída.</string> <string name="visiting_colon">Visitando: %s</string>
<!-- RecurringVisitScreen --> <string name="recurring_visit">Visita Recorrente</string> <string name="search_registered">Buscar Visitante Registrado</string> <string name="search_by_name">Buscar por nome ou documento...</string> <string name="no_results">Nenhum resultado encontrado</string> <string name="try_different_search">Tente um termo de busca diferente</string> <string name="recent_visitors">Visitantes Recentes</string> <string name="last_visit">Última visita</string> <string name="select_visitor">Selecionar</string>
<!-- StationSetupScreen --> <string name="station_setup">Configuração da Estação</string> <string name="enter_pin">Digite o PIN de 8 dígitos</string> <string name="configure_station">Configurar Estação</string> <string name="invalid_pin">PIN inválido. Por favor, tente novamente.</string> <string name="setup_instructions">Esta é a configuração inicial da estação. Digite o PIN fornecido pelo seu administrador.</string> <string name="activate_station">Ativar Estação</string> <string name="station_note_title">Registro único do dispositivo</string> <string name="station_note_body">Esta configuração é realizada apenas uma vez por dispositivo. Uma vez ativada, este tablet será registrado como estação de controle. Contate seu administrador se precisar do PIN de ativação.</string>
<!-- OCR extraction banner --> <string name="ocr_auto_filled">Dados detectados automaticamente do documento</string> <string name="ocr_partial">Dados parcialmente detectados. Verifique os campos.</string> <string name="ocr_none">Não detectado</string> <string name="required_field">Obrigatório</string>
<!-- RecurrentDocumentScanScreen --> <string name="verify_document">Verificar Documento</string> <string name="identity_verification">Verificação de Identidade</string> <string name="identity_verification_hint">Por motivos de certificação, precisamos verificar seu documento novamente.</string> <string name="scan_both_sides">Escaneie os dois lados do documento para continuar</string>
<!-- RecurrentSearchScreen --> <string name="select_visitor_hint">Selecione um visitante para criar um novo registro de visita</string> <string name="search_hint_3chars">Digite pelo menos 3 caracteres para pesquisar</string>
<!-- RecurrentVisitDataScreen --> <string name="visit_information">Informações da Visita</string> <string name="registered_visitor">Visitante Registrado</string> <string name="document_verified">Documento verificado</string> <string name="who_visiting_title">Quem você vai visitar?</string> <string name="who_visiting_hint">Digite o nome completo da pessoa que você vai visitar</string> <string name="complete_field_to_continue">Preencha este campo para continuar</string>
<!-- CheckoutQrScreen (extended) --> <string name="search_visitor_by_name">Pesquisar Visitante por Nome</string> <string name="active_visits_today">Visitas Ativas Hoje</string> <string name="no_active_visits">Nenhuma visita ativa encontrada</string> <string name="qr_scan_auto_hint">O scan QR será ativado automaticamente com a câmera frontal</string> <string name="front_camera_auto">Câmera frontal - Scan automático</string> <string name="checkout_registered_for">Saída registrada com sucesso para:</string> <string name="entry_colon">Entrada: %s</string>
<!-- VisitorBadge --> <string name="view_visitor_badge">Ver Crachá do Visitante</string> <string name="visitor_badge_title">Crachá do Visitante</string> <string name="company_colon">Empresa:</string> <string name="visiting_colon2">Visitando:</string> <string name="valid_colon">Válido:</string> <string name="printed_colon">Impresso:</string> <string name="access_control">Controle de Acesso</string> <string name="badge_note">Este crachá é válido apenas para a data indicada. Deve ser usado visivelmente durante toda a visita.</string>
<!-- AdminPanelScreen --> <string name="admin_panel">Painel de Administração</string> <string name="current_station">Estação Atual</string> <string name="total_visits">Total de Visitas</string> <string name="active_visits">Visitas Ativas</string> <string name="today_visits">Visitas Hoje</string> <string name="month_visits">Visitas do Mês</string> <string name="recent_visits">Visitas Recentes</string> <string name="visits">Visitas</string> <string name="visit_details">Detalhes da Visita</string> <string name="visit_times">Horários da Visita</string> <string name="no_visits_yet">Nenhuma visita registrada ainda</string> <string name="logout">Encerrar Sessão</string> <string name="logout_confirmation">Tem certeza de que deseja encerrar a sessão? Você precisará inserir o PIN novamente.</string> <string name="yes">Sim</string> <string name="no">Não</string> <string name="filters">Filtros</string> <string name="advanced_filters">Filtros Avançados</string> <string name="apply_filters">Aplicar Filtros</string> <string name="clear_filters">Limpar Filtros</string> <string name="filter_by_date">Filtrar por Data</string> <string name="start_date">Data Início</string> <string name="end_date">Data Fim</string> <string name="filter_by_name">Filtrar por Nome</string> <string name="first_name_filter">Nome</string> <string name="last_name_filter">Sobrenome</string> <string name="visiting_person_filter">Pessoa Visitada</string> <string name="visit_status">Status da Visita</string> <string name="all">Todos</string> <string name="selected">selecionados</string> <string name="active">Ativa</string> <string name="completed">Concluída</string> <string name="visitor_type_filter">Tipo de Visitante</string> <string name="status">Status</string> <string name="entry_time">Hora de Entrada</string> <string name="entry">Entrada</string> <string name="exit_time">Hora de Saída</string> <string name="exit">Saída</string> <string name="duration">Duração</string> <string name="technical_info">Informações Técnicas</string> <string name="visit_id">ID da Visita</string> <string name="person_id">ID da Pessoa</string> <string name="still_active">Ainda ativa</string> <string name="in_progress">Em andamento</string> <string name="close">Fechar</string> <string name="custom_reason">Motivo Personalizado</string> <string name="print_badge">Imprimir Crachá</string>
<!-- Impressora / Zebra / Brother --> <string name="printer_settings">Configurações de Impressora</string> <string name="printer_brand">Marca da Impressora</string> <string name="printer_brand_none">Sem impressora</string> <string name="printer_brand_zebra">Zebra</string> <string name="printer_brand_brother">Brother</string> <string name="brother_model">Modelo Brother</string> <string name="connection_type">Tipo de Conexão</string> <string name="printer_usb">USB</string> <string name="printer_network">Rede (TCP/IP)</string> <string name="printer_ip_address">Endereço IP</string> <string name="printer_port">Porta</string> <string name="printer_test">Testar Conexão</string> <string name="printer_connected">Impressora conectada</string> <string name="printing">Imprimindo...</string> <string name="print_success">Crachá impresso com sucesso</string> <string name="save">Salvar</string>
<!-- Printer Diagnostics --> <string name="printer_diagnostics">Diagnóstico</string> <string name="printer_diag_title">Diagnóstico da Impressora</string> <string name="printer_diag_idle">Pressione \"Testar Conexão\" para iniciar o diagnóstico</string> <string name="printer_diag_running">Executando diagnóstico…</string> <string name="printer_diag_summary">Resumo</string> <string name="printer_diag_checks">Verificações</string> <string name="printer_diag_connected">Conectada</string> <string name="printer_diag_not_connected">Não conectada</string> <string name="printer_configuration">Configuração</string> </resources>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <!-- French translations / Traductions françaises --> <resources> <string name="app_name">EFL Visitor App</string>
<!-- ── HomeScreen ──────────────────────────────────── --> <string name="welcome">Bienvenue</string> <string name="visitor_registration_system">Système d\'enregistrement des visiteurs</string> <string name="select_language">Choisir la langue</string> <string name="new_visit">Nouvelle visite</string> <string name="new_visit_desc">Enregistrer un nouveau visiteur</string> <string name="returning_visit">Visite récurrente</string> <string name="returning_visit_desc">Visiteur déjà enregistré</string> <string name="end_visit">Terminer la visite</string> <string name="end_visit_desc">Scanner le QR code de sortie</string>

<!-- ── DocumentScanScreen ─────────────────────────── --> <string name="scan_document">Scanner le document</string> <string name="scan_document_hint">Les documents sont numérisés avec la caméra arrière de l\'appareil</string> <string name="i_am_a">Je suis un:</string> <string name="visitor">Visiteur</string> <string name="visitor_type">Visiteur</string> <string name="contractor">Entrepreneur</string> <string name="vendor">Fournisseur</string> <string name="delivery">Livraison</string> <string name="driver">Chauffeur</string> <string name="temporary_staff">Personnel temporaire</string> <string name="other">Autre</string> <string name="select_option">Sélectionnez une option</string> <string name="what_doc_type">Quel type de document présentez-vous ?</string> <string name="identity_document_id">Document d\'identité / ID</string> <string name="passport">Passeport</string> <string name="front_of_document">Recto du document</string> <string name="back_of_document">Verso du document</string> <string name="scanned_successfully">✓ Scanné avec succès</string> <string name="tap_to_scan">Appuyez pour scanner</string> <string name="scan_front_first">Scannez le recto d\'abord</string>
<!-- ── DocumentCameraModal ────────────────────────── --> <string name="center_document">Centrez le document dans le cadre</string> <string name="focusing">Mise au point…</string> <string name="capturing">Capture…</string> <string name="verifying">Vérification…</string> <string name="document_accepted">Document accepté !</string> <string name="capture_hint">La capture sera automatique lorsque le document sera net</string>
<!-- ── DocumentValidator error messages ──────────── --> <string name="err_raw_blurry">Image floue.\nMaintenez le document immobile et réessayez.</string> <string name="err_crop_failed">Impossible de recadrer le document.\nVeuillez réessayer.</string> <string name="err_crop_blurry">Le document n\'est pas assez net.\nTenez-le stable et plus près.</string> <string name="err_no_text">Aucun texte détecté.\nCentrez le document dans le cadre.</string> <string name="err_not_document">Ne semble pas être un document d\'identité.\nUtilisez un ID, passeport ou permis.</string> <string name="err_not_recognised">Document non reconnu.\nAssurez-vous qu\'il est lisible.</string> <string name="err_duplicate_side">Il semble s\'agir du même côté du document.\nRetournez-le et scannez le verso.</string>
<!-- ── PersonDataScreen ───────────────────────────── --> <string name="visitor_information">Informations du visiteur</string> <string name="personal_information">Informations personnelles</string> <string name="first_name">Prénom(s)</string> <string name="enter_first_name">Entrez le(s) prénom(s)</string> <string name="last_name">Nom(s) de famille</string> <string name="enter_last_name">Entrez le(s) nom(s)</string> <string name="company">Entreprise</string> <string name="email">Adresse e-mail</string> <string name="enter_email">exemple@email.com</string> <string name="phone">Numéro de téléphone</string> <string name="enter_phone">Entrez le numéro de téléphone</string> <string name="who_visiting">Nom complet de la personne visitée</string> <string name="visiting_person">Personne Visitée</string> <string name="enter_who_visiting">Entrez le nom de la personne</string> <string name="personal_photo">Photo personnelle</string> <string name="take_photo">Prendre une photo</string> <string name="retake_photo">Reprendre la photo</string> <string name="photo_taken_successfully">Photo prise avec succès</string> <string name="detected_from_document">Détecté automatiquement depuis le document</string> <string name="visit_and_purpose">Visite et Motif</string> <string name="visit_reason">Motif de la visite</string> <string name="select_visit_reason">Sélectionnez un motif</string> <string name="other_specify">Précisez le motif</string> <string name="document_number">Numéro de document</string>
<!-- Visit Reason Labels --> <string name="reason_meeting">Réunion</string> <string name="reason_interview">Entretien</string> <string name="reason_delivery">Livraison</string> <string name="reason_pickup">Collecte</string> <string name="reason_maintenance">Maintenance</string> <string name="reason_training">Formation</string> <string name="reason_audit">Audit</string> <string name="reason_technical_service">Service technique</string> <string name="reason_onsite_work">Travail sur site</string>
<!-- ── Photo Capture Modal ────────────────────────── --> <string name="get_ready">Préparez-vous !</string> <string name="look_at_camera">Regardez la caméra et souriez</string> <string name="photo_will_be_taken">La photo sera prise automatiquement</string> <string name="position_face">Placez votre visage dans l\'ovale</string> <string name="detecting_face">Détection du visage…</string> <string name="no_face_detected">Aucun visage détecté. Veuillez réessayer.</string> <string name="face_detected">Visage détecté !</string> <string name="retrying_capture">Nouvelle tentative de capture…</string> <string name="face_partial">Visage partiellement visible. Rapprochez-vous de la caméra.</string> <string name="face_off_center">Centrez votre visage sur l\'écran.</string> <string name="skip_face_detection">Prendre la photo sans détection</string> <string name="taking_photo_no_detection">Prise de photo sans détection…</string>
<!-- ── ConfirmScreen ──────────────────────────────── --> <string name="confirmation">Confirmation</string> <string name="verify_information">Vérifier les informations</string> <string name="confirm_subtitle">Veuillez confirmer que les informations sont correctes avant de finaliser l\'enregistrement</string> <string name="documents_verified">Documents vérifiés</string> <string name="front_back_scanned">Recto et verso scannés avec succès</string> <string name="confirm_registration">Confirmer l\'enregistrement</string> <string name="edit_information">Modifier les informations</string> <string name="visitor_data">Données du visiteur</string> <string name="visiting_label">Visite</string> <string name="type_label">Type</string> <string name="document_type">Type de document</string> <string name="full_name_label">Nom complet</string> <string name="date_and_time">Date et heure</string> <string name="registration_success">Enregistrement réussi !</string> <string name="visitor_registered_correctly">Le visiteur a été enregistré avec succès.</string> <string name="visit_registered">Votre visite a été enregistrée avec succès</string> <string name="keep_qr_code">Veuillez conserver ce QR code pour enregistrer votre sortie</string> <string name="visit_qr_code">QR Code de visite</string> <string name="printing_qr">Impression du QR code...</string> <string name="no_printer_found">Aucune imprimante trouvée. Enregistrement terminé avec succès.</string> <string name="printing_badge">Impression du badge visiteur…</string> <string name="badge_printed_and_registered">Visiteur enregistré et badge imprimé avec succès.</string> <string name="print_error_but_registered">Visiteur enregistré avec succès.\nErreur d\'impression : %1$s</string>
<!-- ── CheckoutQrScreen ───────────────────────────── --> <string name="end_visit_title">Terminer la visite</string> <string name="scan_qr_code">Scanner le QR code</string> <string name="present_qr">Présentez le QR code de votre visite pour enregistrer la sortie</string> <string name="place_qr">Placez le QR code\ndans la zone indiquée</string> <string name="scanning_qr">Scan du QR code...</string> <string name="valid_code">Code valide !</string> <string name="processing_checkout">Traitement de la sortie...</string> <string name="start_scanning">Démarrer le scan</string> <string name="use_qr_hint">Utilisez le QR code reçu lors de votre enregistrement d\'entrée</string> <string name="checkout_success">Sortie enregistrée !</string> <string name="checkout_time">Heure de sortie</string> <string name="thanks_for_visit">Merci de votre visite</string> <string name="manual_checkout">Sortie manuelle</string> <string name="manual_checkout_instructions">Scannez le QR code du visiteur ou recherchez-le manuellement par son nom pour compléter la sortie.</string> <string name="visiting_colon">Visite : %s</string>
<!-- ── RecurringVisitScreen ───────────────────────── --> <string name="recurring_visit">Visite récurrente</string> <string name="search_registered">Rechercher un visiteur enregistré</string> <string name="search_by_name">Rechercher par nom ou document...</string> <string name="no_results">Aucun résultat trouvé</string> <string name="try_different_search">Essayez un autre terme de recherche</string> <string name="recent_visitors">Visiteurs récents</string> <string name="last_visit">Dernière visite</string> <string name="select_visitor">Sélectionner</string>
<!-- ── StationSetupScreen ─────────────────────────── --> <string name="station_setup">Configuration de la station</string> <string name="enter_pin">Entrez le PIN à 8 chiffres</string> <string name="configure_station">Configurer la station</string> <string name="invalid_pin">PIN invalide. Veuillez réessayer.</string> <string name="setup_instructions">Il s\'agit de la configuration initiale de la station. Entrez le PIN fourni par votre administrateur.</string> <string name="activate_station">Activer la station</string> <string name="station_note_title">Enregistrement unique de l\'appareil</string> <string name="station_note_body">Cette configuration est effectuée une seule fois par appareil. Une fois activée, cette tablette sera enregistrée comme station de contrôle. Contactez votre administrateur si vous avez besoin du PIN d\'activation.</string>
<!-- ── OCR extraction banner ──────────────────────── --> <string name="ocr_auto_filled">Données détectées automatiquement du document</string> <string name="ocr_partial">Données partiellement détectées. Veuillez vérifier les champs.</string> <string name="ocr_none">Non détecté</string> <string name="required_field">Requis</string>
<!-- ── RecurrentDocumentScanScreen ──────────────────── --> <string name="verify_document">Vérifier le Document</string> <string name="identity_verification">Vérification d\'Identité</string> <string name="identity_verification_hint">Pour des raisons de certification, nous devons vérifier votre document à nouveau.</string> <string name="scan_both_sides">Scannez les deux côtés du document pour continuer</string>
<!-- ── RecurrentSearchScreen ─────────────────────── --> <string name="select_visitor_hint">Sélectionnez un visiteur pour créer un nouvel enregistrement de visite</string> <string name="search_hint_3chars">Entrez au moins 3 caractères pour rechercher</string>

<!-- ── CheckoutQrScreen ───────────────────────────── --> <string name="search_visitor_by_name">Rechercher un Visiteur par Nom</string> <string name="active_visits_today">Visites Actives Aujourd\'hui</string> <string name="no_active_visits">Aucune visite active trouvée</string> <string name="qr_scan_auto_hint">Le scan QR s\'activera automatiquement avec la caméra frontale</string> <string name="front_camera_auto">Caméra frontale • Scan automatique</string> <string name="checkout_registered_for">Sortie enregistrée avec succès pour :</string> <string name="entry_colon">Entrée : %s</string>
<!-- ── VisitorBadge ───────────────────────────────── --> <string name="view_visitor_badge">Voir le Badge Visiteur</string> <string name="visitor_badge_title">Badge Visiteur</string> <string name="company_colon">Entreprise :</string> <string name="visiting_colon2">Visite :</string> <string name="valid_colon">Valide :</string> <string name="printed_colon">Imprimé :</string> <string name="access_control">Contrôle d\'Accès</string> <string name="badge_note">Ce badge n\'est valable que pour la date indiquée. Il doit être porté de façon visible pendant toute la visite.</string>
<!-- ── AdminPanelScreen ───────────────────────────── --> <string name="admin_panel">Panneau d\'Administration</string> <string name="current_station">Station Actuelle</string> <string name="total_visits">Total des Visites</string> <string name="active_visits">Visites Actives</string> <string name="today_visits">Visites Aujourd\'hui</string> <string name="month_visits">Visites du Mois</string> <string name="recent_visits">Visites Récentes</string> <string name="visits">Visites</string> <string name="visit_details">Détails de la Visite</string> <string name="visit_times">Horaires de Visite</string> <string name="no_visits_yet">Aucune visite enregistrée pour le moment</string> <string name="logout">Déconnexion</string> <string name="logout_confirmation">Êtes-vous sûr de vouloir vous déconnecter ? <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <!-- Portuguese (Brazil) translations / Traduções em Português --> <resources> <string name="app_name">EFL Visitor App</string>
<!-- HomeScreen --> <string name="welcome">Bem-vindo</string> <string name="visitor_registration_system">Sistema de Registro de Visitantes</string> <string name="select_language">Selecionar Idioma</string> <string name="new_visit">Nova Visita</string> <string name="new_visit_desc">Registrar um novo visitante</string> <string name="returning_visit">Visita Recorrente</string> <string name="returning_visit_desc">Visitante já registrado</string> <string name="end_visit">Encerrar Visita</string> <string name="end_visit_desc">Escanear código QR de saída</string>
<!-- Language names --> <string name="lang_spanish">Espanhol</string> <string name="lang_english">Inglês</string> <string name="lang_portuguese">Português</string> <string name="lang_french">Francês</string>
<!-- Navigation --> <string name="back">Voltar</string> <string name="continue_btn">Continuar</string> <string name="cancel">Cancelar</string> <string name="finish">Finalizar</string> <string name="accept">Aceitar</string> <string name="confirm">Confirmar</string> <string name="edit">Editar</string> <string name="optional">Opcional</string>
<!-- DocumentScanScreen --> <string name="scan_document">Escanear Documento</string> <string name="scan_document_hint">Os documentos são digitalizados com a câmera traseira do dispositivo</string> <string name="i_am_a">Eu sou um:</string> <string name="visitor">Visitante</string> <string name="visitor_type">Visitante</string> <string name="contractor">Contratante</string> <string name="vendor">Fornecedor</string> <string name="delivery">Entrega</string> <string name="driver">Motorista</string> <string name="temporary_staff">Funcionário Temporário</string> <string name="other">Outro</string> <string name="select_option">Selecione uma opção</string> <string name="what_doc_type">Que tipo de documento você apresenta?</string> <string name="identity_document_id">Documento de Identidade / ID</string> <string name="passport">Passaporte</string> <string name="front_of_document">Frente do Documento</string> <string name="back_of_document">Verso do Documento</string> <string name="scanned_successfully">✓ Escaneado com sucesso</string> <string name="tap_to_scan">Toque para escanear</string> <string name="scan_front_first">Escaneie a frente primeiro</string>
<!-- DocumentCameraModal --> <string name="center_document">Centralize o documento no quadro</string> <string name="focusing">Focando...</string> <string name="capturing">Capturando...</string> <string name="verifying">Verificando...</string> <string name="document_accepted">Documento aceito!</string> <string name="capture_hint">A captura será automática quando o documento estiver em foco</string>
<!-- DocumentValidator error messages --> <string name="err_raw_blurry">Imagem desfocada.\nMantenha o documento quieto e tente novamente.</string> <string name="err_crop_failed">Não foi possível recortar o documento.\nTente novamente.</string> <string name="err_crop_blurry">O documento não está nítido.\nAproxime e estabilize o documento.</string> <string name="err_no_text">Nenhum texto detectado.\nCentralize o documento no quadro.</string> <string name="err_not_document">Não parece ser um documento de identidade.\nUse um ID, passaporte ou carteira.</string> <string name="err_not_recognised">Documento não reconhecido.\nCertifique-se de que está legível.</string> <string name="err_duplicate_side">Parece ser o mesmo lado do documento.\nVire-o e escaneie o verso.</string>
<!-- PersonDataScreen --> <string name="visitor_information">Informações do Visitante</string> <string name="personal_information">Informações Pessoais</string> <string name="first_name">Nome(s)</string> <string name="enter_first_name">Digite o(s) nome(s)</string> <string name="last_name">Sobrenome(s)</string> <string name="enter_last_name">Digite o(s) sobrenome(s)</string> <string name="company">Empresa</string> <string name="email">Endereço de e-mail</string> <string name="enter_email">exemplo@email.com</string> <string name="phone">Número de telefone</string> <string name="enter_phone">Digite o número de telefone</string> <string name="who_visiting">Nome completo da pessoa visitada</string> <string name="visiting_person">Pessoa Visitante</string> <string name="enter_who_visiting">Digite o nome da pessoa</string> <string name="personal_photo">Foto Pessoal</string> <string name="take_photo">Tirar Foto</string> <string name="retake_photo">Tirar Novamente</string> <string name="photo_taken_successfully">Foto tirada com sucesso</string> <string name="visit_and_purpose">Visita e Motivo</string> <string name="visit_reason">Motivo da Visita</string> <string name="select_visit_reason">Selecione um motivo</string> <string name="other_specify">Especifique o motivo</string> <string name="document_number">Número do Documento</string>

Registro finalizado correctamente.</string> <string name="printing_badge">Imprimiendo carnet de visitante…</string> <string name="badge_printed_and_registered">Visitante registrado y carnet impreso exitosamente.</string> <string name="print_error_but_registered">Visitante registrado correctamente.\nError al imprimir: %1$s</string>
<!-- ── CheckoutQrScreen ──────────────────────────────────── --> <string name="end_visit_title">Finalizar Visita</string> <string name="scan_qr_code">Escanear Código QR</string> <string name="present_qr">Presente el código QR de su visita para registrar la salida</string> <string name="place_qr">Coloque el código QR\nen el área marcada</string> <string name="scanning_qr">Escaneando código QR...</string> <string name="valid_code">¡Código Válido!</string> <string name="processing_checkout">Procesando salida...</string> <string name="start_scanning">Iniciar Escaneo</string> <string name="use_qr_hint">Utilice el código QR que recibió al momento del registro de entrada</string> <string name="checkout_success">¡Salida Registrada!</string> <string name="checkout_time">Hora de salida</string> <string name="thanks_for_visit">Gracias por su visita</string> <string name="manual_checkout">Salida Manual</string> <string name="manual_checkout_instructions">Escanee el código QR del visitante o búsquelo manualmente por su nombre para completar la salida.</string> <string name="visiting_colon">Visitando a: %s</string>
<!-- ── RecurringVisitScreen ──────────────────────────────── --> <string name="recurring_visit">Visita Recurrente</string> <string name="search_registered">Buscar Visitante Registrado</string> <string name="search_by_name">Buscar por nombre o documento...</string> <string name="no_results">No se encontraron resultados</string> <string name="try_different_search">Intente con un término de búsqueda diferente</string> <string name="recent_visitors">Visitantes Recientes</string> <string name="last_visit">Última visita</string> <string name="select_visitor">Seleccionar</string>
<!-- ── StationSetupScreen ─────────────────────────────────── --> <string name="station_setup">Configuración de Estación</string> <string name="enter_pin">Ingrese el PIN de 8 dígitos</string> <string name="configure_station">Configurar Estación</string> <string name="invalid_pin">PIN inválido. Por favor, intente nuevamente.</string> <string name="setup_instructions">Esta es la configuración inicial de la estación. Ingrese el PIN proporcionado por su administrador.</string> <string name="activate_station">Activar Estación</string> <string name="station_note_title">Configuración única por dispositivo</string> <string name="station_note_body">Esta configuración solo se realiza una vez. Una vez activada, esta tableta quedará registrada como estación de control. Contacte al administrador si necesita el PIN.</string>
